docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77453092) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURCHIK, KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT MUNAR, MARIAH HOSKINS, ANTOINE DOES ONE THROUGH ONE-HUNDRED NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2026
